candidate.objective: Highly experienced Poly Welder and Operator with over 15 years of continuous experience in HDPE pipeline welding, fabrication, and plant operations. Steven's career spans roles with Aussie Civil & Mining Resources, Polyfit Fabrication, and Polywest Engineering, covering butt fusion, electrofusion, fabrication of mitred bends, fabricated tees, and isometric interpretation. Holds FMG and Rio Tinto site inductions, a Section 44 certificate, and tickets for Roller and Loader. A strong safety record with proven competency across on-site and workshop-based welding environments. Available immediately.

duties: Performed butt fusion welding both on-site and in the workshop environment.
Conducted electrofusion welding on-site and in the workshop.
Fabricated mitred bends and fabricated tees to project specifications.
Operated lifting equipment to support welding and installation activities.
Interpreted isometric drawings for fabrication and installation purposes.
Completed equipment maintenance and reported to Workshop Manager on activities and progress.
Completed all HSEQ paperwork, managed stock, and carried out general workshop duties.
Performed butt fusion and electrofusion welding on-site and in a workshop environment.
Fabricated mitred bends and fabricated tees to specification.
Operated lifting equipment and completed isometric interpretation for fabrication.
Maintained welding equipment and reported progress to Workshop Manager.
Completed HSEQ documentation and managed workshop stock levels.
Carried out butt fusion and electrofusion welding on-site and in the workshop.
Performed pre-fabrication of spools from isometric drawings.
Maintained equipment in accordance with manufacturer and project requirements.
Completed HSEQ paperwork and worked autonomously to deliver project outcomes.
Performed butt fusion and electrofusion welding on-site and in the workshop.
Fabricated mitred bends and fabricated tees.
Operated lifting equipment and conducted isometric interpretation.
Completed HSEQ documentation, managed stock, and performed general workshop duties.
Completed on-site construction of sheds, patios, driveways, and house slabs.
Carried out earthworks and applied a variety of concrete finishes.
Trained and mentored new personnel in site procedures.
Performed general on-site duties in support of project delivery.

skills.detail: Highly proficient in butt fusion and electrofusion welding of HDPE pipelines, in both on-site and workshop settings. Experienced in pipe sizes from 63mm to 800mm+
Skilled in the fabrication of mitred bends, fabricated tees, and custom spool work using isometric drawings. Experienced in pre-fabrication for on-site installation.
Holds tickets for Roller and Loader. Experienced in the operation of lifting equipment to support pipeline welding and installation activities.
Consistently completes HSEQ documentation, attends safety meetings, and upholds zero-harm standards across all project environments.

certifications.details: Accredited butt fusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
Accredited electrofusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
Section 44 certificate — Appointed Person for lifting operations.
Certified to operate roller / compactor plant.
Certified to operate front end loader plant.
Certified for safe tilt-up concrete panel operations.
Fortescue Metals Group site induction — current.
